title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Strong thunderstorms are expected for S Germany, S Poland & Austria.

---Risk Areas---

MDRT #1
S Germany & Austria

Strong thunderstorms are expected in the risk area. Favourable environment for strong thunderstorm (supercells also) will be present. Weak tornado also isnt ruled out.
The main threats are:
- Hail - up to 3cm is possible
- Wind gusts - Wind gusts wont mostly be strong during thunderstorms. Isolated thunderstorms may carry a larger risk of strong wind gusts especially near Lake Constance.

- Tornado - Isolated weak and brief tornado is possible - Waterspout scenario is more likely near Lake Constance

MDRT #2
S Poland

Strong thunderstorm complex is likely.
The main threats are:
- Heavy rain - up to 71mm in 3hrs is possible
- Flash flooding - due to heavy rain
- Wind gusts - up to 50km/h
- Hail - up to 3cm is possible
